title: PERK — SING with VEC06X + ECHO (Robotron)
tldr: SING preset using `VEC06X` and the `ECHO` subroutine — produces a percussive "perky" sound. Source name `PERK$$` (the `$$` is reserved-flag decoration; explainer-card key is `PERK`).
how: SING engine plus an echo wrapper that re-fires the vector with decay. Short fundamental + decaying repeats.
watch: Echo trails visible in the spectrogram.
